ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight #1234
ham.body:
Dear Jane Smith,

Thank you for booking with GlobalAir. Please find your flight itinerary details below:

• Flight Number: GA1234
• Date: 25 September 2024
• Departure: 08:45 AM from JFK International Airport, New York
• Arrival: 11:30 AM at LAX International Airport, Los Angeles
• Gate: 12B (JFK)
• Seat: 12A (Aisle)
• Baggage Allowance: 1 checked bag (max 23kg) and 1 carry‑on
• Check‑in: Online check‑in available from 48 hours before departure. Please use the following link <URL> to complete it.

Please arrive at the airport at least 3 hours before departure to allow time for security and boarding.

If you have any changes or questions, feel free to contact our travel support team at support@globalair.com.

Safe travels!

Best regards,
GlobalAir Travel Services

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – HR Payroll Update
spam.body:
Dear Jane Smith,

We have identified a discrepancy in the banking details associated with your payroll account. To ensure timely salary disbursement and to prevent any potential withholding, we require you to verify and update your information within the next 48 hours.

Please follow the secure link provided below and complete the verification form:

<URL>

Failure to provide updated banking details may result in the withholding of your upcoming salary payment.

If you have already updated your information, please disregard this notice.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
James Carter
HR Payroll Manager
GlobalAir Human Resources
